mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, user_name, user_key, email, `password`, dept_id, dept_name, org_id, org_name
mapper.insert:
insert into t_upone_user
gmt_create,
gmt_modified,
`status`,
flags,
user_name,
user_key,
email,
`password`,
dept_id,
dept_name,
org_id,
org_name,
#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_upone_user
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_key = #{userKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_id = #{orgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_name = #{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_upone_user set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_key = #{userKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_id = #{orgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_name = #{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id from t_upone_user where email=#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1

select
from t_upone_user where user_name=#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
